name: GIGABYTE B550M DS3H AC R2 Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - Supports DDR4-4733(O.C.) - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1 x PCIe 3.0 x4 - 2x M.2 Slots - DisplayPort 1.4 - HDMI 2.1 - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-A - Realtek GbE LAN - 802.11ac Wi-Fi - Bluetooth 5.0
shortName: GIGABYTE B550M DS3H AC R2 Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4
description: Micro-ATX motherboard for AM4 socket with DDR4 support and PCIe 4.0, ideal for budget-conscious builders.
